title: Outtakes from Evangelion (Vol.1)
wikitext:
{{Media Infobox
| name      = Outtakes from Evangelion (Vol.1)
| image     = [[Image:Outtakes from Evangelion.jpg|200px]]
| publisher = {{Publisher|JP=King Records/Starchild}}
| release   = {{Release|JP=July 30, 2016}}
| media     = Audio CD
| author    = [[Shiro Sagisu]]
}}
'''Outtakes from Evangelion (Vol.1)''' is an album consisting of mostly unreleased songs and alternate versions of songs from the [[Neon Genesis Evangelion]] TV series, the movie [[The End of Evangelion]], and pieces from the [[Rebuild]] movies up through 3.0. Some tracks which were previously released on [[S² Works]] have been corrected and/or remastered. It was released by King Record Co., Ltd. on July 30, 2016 with catalog number KICA-3262.

html:
Outtakes from Evangelion (Vol.1)
Publisher
  • Japan King Records/Starchild
Release Date
  • Japan July 30, 2016
Media Type Audio CD
Author Shiro Sagisu

Outtakes from Evangelion (Vol.1) is an album consisting of mostly unreleased songs and alternate versions of songs from the Neon Genesis Evangelion TV series, the movie The End of Evangelion, and pieces from the Rebuild movies up through 3.0. Some tracks which were previously released on S² Works have been corrected and/or remastered. It was released by King Record Co., Ltd. on July 30, 2016 with catalog number KICA-3262.

Track Listing[edit]

All music composed by Shiro Sagisu except for Auld Lang Syne, which is a traditional Scottish melody that is also famous in Japan (the strings section is an added arrangement by Sagisu).
